description_long: EP (epfcu.org) is listed as a credit union but the company's website is currently inaccessible due to a 403 Forbidden error. This prevents verification of basic organizational details, membership requirements, service offerings, or operational status. Without access to official company information, product descriptions, fee schedules, or member benefits, a factual profile cannot be reliably constructed. The 403 error suggests either site maintenance, access restrictions, or potential technical issues. Any profile generated without actual website content would violate the requirement to base all information on verified sources. To complete this profile accurately, either direct contact with EP leadership would be necessary, or the website accessibility issue must be resolved to access their official materials and service descriptions.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)

NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
Low-income designated — may offer Payday Alternative Loans (PALs)
